name: writhing_stalker.live_exposed_retreat_mcw
description: Attempt 3 live writhing-stalker exposed-retreat scene proof: install the McWilliams live-debug fixture through a harness-only noon game-turn transform, guard saved noon before spawn, spawn one hostile writhing stalker on a naturally bright/exposed daylight tile, turn safe mode off, require the live monster-plan seam to choose exposed/focused withdrawal, then save/audit same-run active-monster state.

steps.label: post_load_stalker_live_exposed_retreat_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: the harness-only noon-transformed McWilliams live-debug fixture loads to the normal live map before the writhing stalker is spawned

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_writhing_stalker_spawn
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove local noon before the writhing-stalker exposed-retreat spawn
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player turn metadata proves the fixture is at local noon before spawning the writhing stalker; this replaces the failed wait-to-noon ritual

steps.label: debug_spawn_writhing_stalker_exposed_east
steps.preconditions: noon-transformed dev-harness/McWilliams fixture is loaded and focused; debug spawn monster primitive starts from the main map screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug spawn monster helper returns to the live map after selecting writhing stalker and confirming a target tile seven squares east of the player, matching the naturally bright/exposed daylight tile seen in prior target_probe traces
steps.expected_immediate_state: one hostile mon_writhing_stalker should exist on a naturally daylight-exposed tile at plausible visible distance, not on top of the player
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing later same-run exposed/focused withdrawal artifact lines makes this row non-green

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_writhing_stalker_live_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off after the writhing stalker spawn so the live turn window is not consumed by the safe-mode monster warning prompt

steps.label: advance_short_exposed_focus_retreat_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: a short live turn window runs after the exposed daylight stalker spawn; feature proof depends on same-run writhing_stalker live_plan debug lines, not the screenshot alone
steps.failure_rule: if the artifact delta lacks the exposed/focus withdrawal live_plan line with a bright target or bright stalker, this scene is inconclusive rather than green

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_exposed_retreat_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain a live writhing-stalker exposed/focused withdrawal line with target_bright=yes or stalker_bright=yes
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the live monster-plan seam evaluated the spawned writhing stalker in daylight exposure and chose withdrawal for focused contact

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_writhing_stalker_retreat_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after the exposed/focus live-plan window and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_writhing_stalker_retreat_window
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the writhing-stalker save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the live-plan window; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven

steps.label: confirm_save_after_writhing_stalker_retreat_window
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_writhing_stalker_retreat_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the writhing-stalker live-scene save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed writhing-stalker live-scene save, proving the following active_monsters audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_after_exposed_retreat_scene
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain mon_writhing_stalker after same-run exposed/focus retreat proof
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved active_monsters metadata contains the live writhing stalker after the exposed/focus retreat window

evidence_contract.claim: a spawned writhing stalker reaches the live monster-plan seam and withdraws from focused contact while either the target or stalker is naturally bright/exposed at noon
evidence_contract.setup_guard: the run uses a harness-only game_turn save transform to local noon plus a saved-turn/time audit before spawn; it does not synthesize map light, fields, or artificial lamps
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker live behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No exposed-retreat live-scene credit if startup/load, saved noon guard, debug-spawn footing, safe-mode-off live turn window, same-run bright/focused withdrawal line, save/writeback, and active-monster metadata are not all present and classified separately.
